description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, hexagonal base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad, white reflective stripes encircling its midsection, both of which show significant wear and dirt accumulation. The surface of the cone is visibly scuffed, faded, and dirty, indicating extensive outdoor use. The base appears to be made of a heavier, dark gray rubber or composite material, designed to keep the cone upright and stable in windy or high-traffic environments. There are some faint markings or text visible on one side of the cone, suggesting it may have been labeled for identification or inventory purposes. The tip of the cone is slightly rounded and solid, with no attachments or openings.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two wide, dirty white reflective stripes and a heavy, hexagonal black base. The cone shows visible scuffs, fading, and some text markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cone's orange body, two wide, dirty white reflective stripes, and the full hexagonal black base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting faded reflective stripes and visible text markings on the upper stripe.
description_view_2: Rear view with more pronounced wear on the lower stripe and less visible text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the most worn reflective stripe and a clear view of the base's thickness.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height. Both stripes are faded and dirty.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is solid, slightly rounded, and orange, with visible dirt and wear but no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is hexagonal, thick, and made of heavy black or dark gray rubber, providing stability and weight. It has a textured, ribbed pattern for grip.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: There is faint text visible on one side of the upper stripe, possibly for identification, but no prominent logos.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with faded reflective stripes, visible scuffs, and some text markings.
